name: OVH_Domain_Redirection
author: THA-CERT
description: Redirect an owned Domain Name on OVH Cloud, to a specific URL.

configurationItems.name: API_endpoint
configurationItems.description: Specify here OVH API's endpoint. Eg: 'ovh-eu', 'ovh-us' or 'ovh-ca'.

configurationItems.name: API_ovh_subsidiary
configurationItems.description: Specify here which OVH subsidiary where you want to order. Will be 'EU', 'US' or 'CA' by default.

configurationItems.name: API_ak
configurationItems.description: Specify here the Application key of your OVH Cloud account.

configurationItems.name: API_as
configurationItems.description: Specify here the Application secret of your OVH Cloud account.

configurationItems.name: API_cs
configurationItems.description: Specify here the Consumer secret of your OVH Cloud account.

configurationItems.name: domain_redirection
configurationItems.description: Set URL where redirect to, after acquiring the current domain name. EG: 'https://www.myhomepage.com'

configurationItems.name: thehive_url
configurationItems.description: Optionally, specify here the API URL to add informational tags to observable.

configurationItems.name: thehive_token
configurationItems.description: Optionally, specify here the API Key to add informational tags to observable.
